title: The Master Mind of Mars
description: The Master Mind of Mars — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: "A Letter (Frame Story)"
memes.description: "A Letter (Frame Story) — The Master Mind of Mars by Edgar Rice Burroughs"

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "The Master Mind of Mars" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: "Amhor"
memes.description: "Amhor is a Barsoomian city-state and the hereditary enemy of Duhor, ruled by Prince Jal Had."

memes.label: Assassins' Guild
memes.description: The Assassins' Guild is a formal institution on Barsoom whose members practice political killing as an honorable profession, governed by a strict code of ethics and recognized within the social order.

memes.label: Bal Zak
memes.description: Bal Zak is a Toonolian flier captain who commands the Vosar, the patrol ship that intercepts Vad Varo's company during their escape from Ras Thavas's island.

memes.label: Banth
memes.description: The banth is the fierce Barsoomian lion, a powerful predator native to Mars that is sometimes domesticated for ceremonial purposes by the ruling classes.

memes.label: Barsoom
memes.description: Barsoom is the native Martian name for the planet Mars, a dying world of ancient civilizations, red men, green men, and the miraculous science of brain transplantation.

memes.label: Bodyguard
memes.description: A bodyguard is a personal protector assigned to a high-value individual on Barsoom, a role governed by rational self-interest rather than loyalty or sentiment.

memes.label: Brain Transplantation
memes.description: Brain transplantation is the revolutionary surgical procedure perfected by Ras Thavas that allows the transfer of a living brain from one body to another, serving as the central plot device of the novel.

memes.label: Calot
memes.description: The calot is a fierce Barsoomian dog-like creature used as a guard animal, swift enough to nearly overtake a man and dangerous enough to be a credible threat.

memes.label: "Concept Index"
memes.description: "All concepts, terms, and cultural elements of Barsoom featured in The Master Mind of Mars by Edgar Rice Burroughs."

memes.label: Dar Tarus
memes.description: Dar Tarus is a noble warrior of Phundahl whose body was stolen by the treacherous Sag Or; resurrected by Vad Varo, he fights to reclaim his identity and ultimately becomes Jeddak of Phundahl.

memes.label: Dejah Thoris
memes.description: Dejah Thoris is the Princess of Mars, wife of John Carter, whose legendary beauty and courage made her a cultural icon across Barsoom even in worlds she never visited.

memes.label: Duhor
memes.description: Duhor is a distant Barsoomian city, home of Princess Valla Dia, lying seven thousand eight hundred haads from Toonol across the Artolian Hills.

memes.label: Dwar
memes.description: Dwar is a Barsoomian military rank equivalent to captain, typically commanding a ship or a unit of the Jeddak's or Jeddara's Guard.

memes.label: "Earth"
memes.description: "Earth, known to Barsoomians as Jasoom, is the home planet of the protagonist Ulysses Paxton — the third planet from the sun whose lesser gravity grants Earthmen extraordinary physical abilities on Mars."

memes.label: Equilibrimotor
memes.description: An equilibrimotor is a Barsoomian personal flight device consisting of a belt filled with the eighth ray to neutralize gravity, paired with radium-powered motors and adjustable wings for controlled flight. Used by civilians, law enforcement, and military personnel alike, it is the standard means of personal aerial movement on Barsoom and plays a crucial role in Vad Varo's escape from Toonol.

memes.label: Ersite
memes.description: Ersite is a polished stone-like material used for surgical operating tables in Ras Thavas's laboratory on Barsoom, associated with the brain transplantation procedures central to the novel.

memes.label: Flier
memes.description: A flier is a radium-powered flying vessel used across Barsoom for transportation, commerce, and warfare — the primary means of long-distance travel on the Red Planet.

memes.label: Gor Hajus
memes.description: Gor Hajus is the legendary assassin of Toonol, renowned for his strict code of honor — he never kills women, good men, or strikes from behind.

memes.label: Great Toonolian Marshes
memes.description: The Great Toonolian Marshes are a vast, inhospitable wetland region of Barsoom stretching nearly eighteen hundred Earth miles, bounded by the rival city-states of Phundahl and Toonol.

memes.label: The Great Tur
memes.description: The Great Tur is a colossal idol of the god Tur housed in the principal temple of Phundahl, whose hollow interior serves as a hiding place and observation post for Vad Varo and Gor Hajus.

memes.label: Haads
memes.description: A haad is a Barsoomian unit of distance, roughly comparable to an Earthly mile, used for measuring overland and aerial travel across the Martian surface.

memes.label: Helium
memes.description: Helium is the greatest and most powerful city-state on Barsoom, ruled by the Jeddak Tardos Mors and home to John Carter, Warlord of Mars.

memes.label: High Priestess
memes.description: The High Priestess is the supreme religious authority of the Temple of Tur in Phundahl, a role held by Jeddara Xaxa — combining both political and religious power over the city-state.

memes.label: Hora San
memes.description: Hora San was the long-dead Jeddak and high priest of Tur whose mysterious disappearance a century before the novel's events left the Great Tur silent — until Vad Varo exploited the legend to stage his miracle.

memes.label: House of Kan
memes.description: The House of Kan is a powerful noble dynasty of Toonol, whose prince Mu Tel provides crucial sanctuary to Vad Varo and his companions.

memes.label: House of the Dead
memes.description: The House of the Dead is Ras Thavas's vast surgical facility where preserved bodies are stored and brain-transplant operations are performed, serving as the novel's primary setting.

memes.label: Hovan Du
memes.description: Hovan Du is a great white ape of Barsoom whose body houses a human brain through Ras Thavas's transplantation, making him a fierce and loyal companion to Vad Varo.

memes.label: Island of Thavas
memes.description: The Island of Thavas is a fortified island in the Great Toonolian Marshes housing the laboratory and tower of Ras Thavas, where the novel's brain transplantation experiments are conducted.

memes.label: Jal Had
memes.description: Jal Had is the Prince of Amhor whose ruthless attack on Duhor — driven by his desire to possess Princess Valla Dia — set in motion the chain of events that led to Valla Dia's body being stolen by Xaxa.

memes.label: Jeddak
memes.description: Jeddak is the Barsoomian title for an emperor or supreme ruler of a nation, a hereditary position that commands absolute loyalty from subjects and warriors alike. The novel explores the tension between this hereditary system and rational governance through multiple Jeddaks across Toonol, Phundahl, Duhor, and Helium.

memes.label: Jeddara
memes.description: Jeddara is the Barsoomian title for a reigning empress or queen; Xaxa, Jeddara of Phundahl, is the novel's primary antagonist whose abuse of power drives the central conflict.

memes.label: Jetan
memes.description: Jetan is a strategic Barsoomian board game, comparable to chess in its cultural role as the definitive intellectual pastime. Played across all social ranks on Mars, its absorbing quality is such that devoted players neglect their duties for the pleasure of a match — a vulnerability that proves critical to the escape of Vad Varo's party from Toonol.

memes.label: John Carter
memes.description: John Carter is the Warlord of Barsoom and Prince of Helium, an Earthman transported to Mars whose exploits inspired Ulysses Paxton to seek the same fate.

memes.label: Kara Vasa
memes.description: Kara Vasa is a young Phundahlian noblewoman and the beloved of Dar Tarus, whose disappearance and eventual reunion with him bookend the novel's central love story.

memes.label: Kor San
memes.description: Kor San is the Jeddak of Duhor and the father of Valla Dia, whose refusal of Jal Had's marriage suit led to the invasion of his city and the chain of events that cost his daughter her body.

memes.label: "Master Mind of Mars"
memes.description: "The title applied to Ras Thavas, the greatest surgeon on Barsoom, whose unparalleled skill in brain transplantation, scientific detachment from sentiment, and morally ambiguous genius drive the novel's central plot and thematic concerns."

memes.label: "Medical College of Ras Thavas"
memes.description: "The vast surgical facility maintained by Ras Thavas on Barsoom, where brain transplantation, organ replacement, and bodily restoration are performed on an industrial scale. The college serves as the primary setting for the novel's first half, functioning simultaneously as hospital, research institute, body repository, and prison."

memes.label: Mu Tel
memes.description: Mu Tel is the Prince of the House of Kan in Toonol, a loyal friend of Gor Hajus who provides crucial sanctuary and assistance to Vad Varo's company.
aliases: Prince of the House of Kan

memes.label: Odwar
memes.description: An odwar is a high-ranking Barsoomian military officer, roughly equivalent to a general, commanding the palace guard or an army.

memes.label: Palace of Mu Tel
memes.description: The Palace of Mu Tel is the luxurious Toonolian residence of Prince Mu Tel of the House of Kan, where Vad Varo and his companions find refuge after their escape from Ras Thavas's island.
aliases: Palace of the House of Kan

memes.label: Palace of Xaxa
memes.description: The Palace of Xaxa is the royal seat of power in Phundahl, where the Jeddara Xaxa rules from a heavily guarded court complex encompassing audience chambers, royal apartments, temple grounds, and hidden pits.

memes.label: Panthan
memes.description: A panthan is a Barsoomian soldier of fortune — a roving mercenary without national allegiance who sells their sword to the highest bidder under a strict code of professional ethics.

memes.label: "Character Index"
memes.description: "All characters featured in The Master Mind of Mars by Edgar Rice Burroughs, ordered alphabetically."

memes.label: Phundahl
memes.description: Phundahl is a Barsoomian city-state ruled by the tyrannical Jeddara Xaxa, whose inhabitants are described by Ras Thavas as egregious sentimentalists enslaved to hereditary rule.

memes.label: "Phundahlian"
memes.description: "The people and culture of Phundahl, a Barsoomian city-state ruled by the Jeddara Xaxa"

memes.label: "Pimalia"
memes.description: "A flowering Barsoomian shrub cultivated in the palace district of Phundahl, known for its beautiful blossoms"

memes.label: Pinsar
memes.description: The Pinsar is one of Ras Thavas's three fliers — used by the protagonists as a decoy vessel, sent unmanned toward the east to create a diversion for their escape aboard the Vosar.

memes.label: "Location Index"
memes.description: "All locations and places featured in The Master Mind of Mars by Edgar Rice Burroughs, ordered alphabetically."

memes.label: "Ptarth"
memes.description: "Ptarth is a sovereign Barsoomian city-state renowned alongside Helium for having the most advanced aerial navy on Mars, its fliers far outstripping those of other nations in speed."

memes.label: Ras Thavas
memes.description: Ras Thavas is the titular "Master Mind of Mars," an ancient and brilliant Barsoomian surgeon who has mastered the technology of brain transplantation and presides over a vast medical institution on an island near Toonol.

memes.label: Red Planet
memes.description: The Red Planet is the Earthly name for Mars, known to its inhabitants as Barsoom — a dying world of red deserts, ancient civilizations, and lesser gravity that forms the setting of the novel.

memes.label: Sag Or
memes.description: Sag Or is a handsome young Phundahlian noble and the favorite of Jeddara Xaxa, whose body was stolen from Dar Tarus through Ras Thavas's transplantation.

memes.label: Sorapus
memes.description: The sorapus is a magnificent Barsoomian shade tree prized for its beauty as an ornamental planting and valued for its dense, durable wood used in construction and furniture.

memes.label: Suspended Animation
memes.description: Suspended animation is the preservation technique used by Ras Thavas to store living bodies in a deathlike state, using embalming fluid and ersite slabs to maintain tissue viability indefinitely.

memes.label: Tals
memes.description: The tal is a Barsoomian unit of time roughly equivalent to one Earth second, used in everyday speech for short durations and moments of urgency.

memes.label: Tars Tarkas
memes.description: Tars Tarkas is the great Jeddak of the Tharks, a Green Martian warrior whose friendship with John Carter became legendary across Barsoom and inspired Ulysses Paxton alongside tales of Carter himself.

memes.label: "Temple of Tur"
memes.description: "The Temple of Tur is the great temple in Phundahl dedicated to the god Tur, where elaborate public worship is conducted and where Vad Varo stages a dramatic divine intervention."

memes.label: The Pits
memes.description: The Pits are the subterranean vaults and passages beneath Ras Thavas's island laboratory, used for storage, concealment, and covert movement throughout the novel.

memes.label: Thoat
memes.description: The thoat is a large Barsoomian animal raised for its meat — thoat steak is a common food item available in shops and eating places across the cities of Barsoom.

memes.label: Toonol
memes.description: Toonol is a major Barsoomian city-state ruled by Jeddak Vobis Kan, home to Ras Thavas's laboratory and the assassin Gor Hajus.

memes.label: "Toonolian"
memes.description: "The people and culture of Toonol, a Barsoomian city-state known for its peculiar philosophical outlook"

memes.label: Tower of Thavas
memes.description: The Tower of Thavas is the island fortress-laboratory of Ras Thavas in the Great Toonolian Marshes, where the Master Mind of Mars conducts his brain transplantation experiments.

memes.label: Tur
memes.description: Tur is the principal deity worshiped on Barsoom, particularly in the city of Phundahl, where elaborate temple rituals and a powerful priesthood maintain the faith through ceremonial observance rather than theological doctrine.

memes.label: Turgan
memes.description: Turgan is the sacred book of the Phundahlian religion, believed to have been written by the god Tur himself, and serves as the sole authoritative text for all knowledge in Phundahl.

memes.label: Ulysses Paxton
memes.description: Ulysses Paxton is the narrator and protagonist of The Master Mind of Mars — an American Army captain transported to Barsoom who becomes the assistant to the master surgeon Ras Thavas.

memes.label: Vad Varo
memes.description: Vad Varo is the Barsoomian name of Ulysses Paxton, an Earthman transported to Mars who becomes Ras Thavas's assistant and leads the quest to restore Valla Dia to her rightful body.

memes.label: Valla Dia
memes.description: Valla Dia is the Princess of Duhor whose beautiful body was stolen by the Jeddara Xaxa through Ras Thavas's brain-transfer procedure, leaving her consciousness trapped in Xaxa's aged, disfigured form.

memes.label: Vobis Kan
memes.description: Vobis Kan is the Jeddak of Toonol, a tyrannical ruler whose persecution of Gor Hajus sets in motion the assassin's resurrection and quest for vengeance.

memes.label: Vosar
memes.description: The Vosar is a slow commercial flier commanded by Bal Zak, operating between the Tower of Thavas and the city of Toonol — used by the protagonists to stow away on their escape.

memes.label: White Ape
memes.description: The white ape is a massive, savage predator native to Barsoom, known for its ferocity and strength — one of the most fearsome creatures of the Red Planet, capable of being surgically fused with human brain tissue.

memes.label: Woola
memes.description: Woola is the famous calot companion of John Carter, War Lord of Barsoom — a loyal Barsoomian creature known to readers of the Martian chronicles as Carter's faithful guardian.

memes.label: Xaxa
memes.description: Xaxa is the tyrannical Jeddara (queen) of Phundahl who purchases Valla Dia's beautiful young body from Ras Thavas to escape her own aged, disfigured form.

memes.label: Yamdor
memes.description: Yamdor is the personal slave and body servant of Ras Thavas, a huge and feared figure in the laboratory complex whose gentle manner conceals a jealous and vindictive mind.

memes.label: "Zode"
memes.description: "Barsoomian unit of time, approximately equivalent to an Earth hour"
